name: Stilton, Bacon, & Scallion Puffs
recipeIngredient: 4 slices Bacon, cooked crisp and crumbled fine
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small heavy saucepan, combine the water, butter, and a pinch of salt. Bring the mixture to a boil over high heat.
2. Reduce the heat to moderate. Gradually add the flour all at once, stirring constantly with a wooden spoon until it pulls away from the pan and forms a ball.
3. Remove the pan from the heat. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Stir in the crumbled Stilton, cooked bacon, minced scallions, salt, and pepper to taste.
4. Drop rounded teaspoons of the batter two inches apart onto lightly buttered baking sheets.
5. Bake the puffs in the middle of a preheated 425°F (220°C) oven for 15 to 20 minutes, or until they are crisp and golden. Makes 36 hors d'oeuvres.
